prompt: A rain-soaked street at night reflecting vivid neon — hot pink and electric blue dominating, with deep purple shadows. No people visible, just wet asphalt stretching into fog with neon signage glow diffusing into halos. Steam rising from a vent on the right side. Anamorphic oval bokeh highlights from distant lights. Cyberpunk mood. 16:9, photorealistic.
negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, collage, split screen, multi-panel, low detail, cluttered composition, extra objects, cartoon, illustration, CGI look, unreadable signage, oversharpening

settings.depth_of_field: controlled depth of field for thumbnail readability
